main.name: Aleksei Beliaev
main.description: I work as full-stack software developer and have a wide experience of creating and maintaining IT systems. Most of all I use C#, JavaScript, Rest API, Rabbit Mq. With C# I mean Net (.NetFramework, Net Core, EF Core, Nlog, NewtonSoft, OpenXML). JavaScript is not only a native language, but also TypeScript and the React library. I also created several simple tools with NodeJS, so JavaScript is not only for frontend.
main.bio: I am looking for a job in Israel - Tel-Aviv, Rehovot, Haifa
main.about: I work as full-stack software developer and have a wide experience of creating and maintaining IT systems. Most of all I use C#, JavaScript, Rest API, Rabbit Mq. With C# I mean Net (.NetFramework, Net Core, EF Core, Nlog, NewtonSoft, OpenXML). JavaScript is not only a native language, but also TypeScript and the React library. I also created several simple tools with NodeJS, so JavaScript is not only for frontend.

education.school: Moscow Institute of Radio Equipment, Electronics and Automation
education.description: Development of radio engineering and communication environments

work.title: Senior Full-stack Software Developer
work.description: I successfully completed migration from SharePoint 2010 to SharePoint 2019 - 25k+ active users, ~1Tb content databases. I developed and implemented tools for direct data migration from SharePoint 2010 to 2019. Successfully led a small team of developers. Created a number of applications in stack of React, C# (.Net) and MS SQL for internal needs.

work.title: Full-stack SharePoint Software developer
work.description: Full support of the system based on Microsoft SharePoint. Collaborated with contractors to offer and then develop and implement different solutions. Integrated various features and technical specifications of applications, continuous functionality of the Portal system, developed SharePoint solutions for internal needs. Developed applications (Asp.net, C#, MSSQL, SharePoint) with data from several databases, AD, synchronous and asynchronous exchanges between different data sources.

work.title: Junior software developer
work.description: Development of simple applications and functions for internal needs of the company - polls, photogallery, making promo-pages. Simple SQL requests and usage in web-applications

skills.name: Asp.Net, C#: MVC applications, WebForms, Console applications
skills.description: The development of the small tools, the parts of microservices and the monolith applications for Net Framework and Net Core, the usage of the extensions EntityFramework, Dapper, Nlog, NewtonSoft, OpenXML and many others.

skills.name: JavaScript and libraries (React and connected libraries, jQuery, NodeJS)
skills.description: The front-end development with popular JS frameworks and libraries - React, Redux, Antd, Axios, Bootstrap, jQuery (mostly for old projects). I use webpack to bundle JavaScript and TypeScript applications.

skills.name: XHTML, CSS, XML: deep knowledge of formats and technologies
skills.description: The modern usage of CSS and SCSS for styles, use webpack to automize the CSS compilation.

skills.name: Microsoft SharePoint: development webparts, timer-jobs integration with external applications
skills.description: The full cycle of work with MS SharePoint (2010, 2019) - the creating a farm, the development of webparts, timerjobs and console applications for the export-import of data, integrations with external applications, Office online.

skills.name: Devops engineer
skills.description: Setting up the CI/CD processes with Gitlab, the automation of the creating environments with Terraform (AWS, YandexCloud) and Vagrant (VirtualBox).
